generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloud
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for depth perception and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData, VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloud, DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CppROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, data saving, and reporting of vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, Reporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC system on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlLogic, ProjectedDrivingPath, SafeFollowingDistance
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via UI with commands to enable/disable, set desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrake
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and vehicle state data"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object tracks to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Reporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated reports generated from stored vehicle data"
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC control logic compliant with ISO 15622 Performance Class I"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on lead vehicle detection"
]

instance SafeFollowingDistance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated safe following distance for maintaining safe spacing"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via remote UI command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via remote UI command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via remote UI command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderESCSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering control"
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for onboard processing"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for onboard processing"
]

instance TraxxasSlashVehicle : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VedderESCSpeedController, SteeringServo, JetsonNX, JetsonOrinNano
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for desired speed, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable commands sent from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling FE to the motor and steering actuators in the Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for distributed system coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entities communicate via ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions across all system components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation), validation of requirements compliance, and operation phase (optimization and health monitoring) throughout the vehicle lifecycle, supporting digital threads for end-to-end information flow."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC system implemented per ISO 15622 Performance Class I; latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization 100 ms for safety-critical operation; specific verification/validation mechanisms beyond these requirements not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity components (e.g., ACC, Data Storage) deployed on external devices; User Entity on remote devices for visualization and control."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT design and ISO 15622 for ACC implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operation ensured via strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (100 ms) requirements; no specific cybersecurity measures or safety protocols beyond these requirements detailed in the document."
]
